query:
-- Verificar novo responsável
SELECT id, legal_name, trade_name, cpf_cnpj FROM financial_responsibles ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 3;

-- Verificar vínculo com PACSML
SELECT fru.id, fru.unit_id, fru.financial_responsible_id, fr.legal_name, fru.starts_at, fru.ends_at
FROM financial_responsible_units fru
JOIN financial_responsibles fr ON fr.id = fru.financial_responsible_id
WHERE fru.unit_id = 210001
ORDER BY fru.starts_at DESC;

-- Verificar preço de médico inserido
SELECT bdp.id, bdp.unit_id, bdp.doctor_user_id, usr.name as doctor_name, bdp.financial_responsible_id, bdp.price_per_report, bdp.starts_at
FROM billing_doctor_unit_prices bdp
JOIN users usr ON usr.id = bdp.doctor_user_id
WHERE bdp.unit_id = 210001
ORDER BY bdp.starts_at DESC;
